assertions.reason: test/XcmInbox.ts passed 14 tests, including 'records correlationId and emits ReceiptReceived', 'reverts with DuplicateCorrelationId on second call with same ID', and 'reverts with AccessManagedUnauthorized when called by an unauthorized address', confirming correlation tracking, duplicate rejection, event emission, and authorized-only receipt submission.

test/LiquidationHookRegistry.ts passed 27 tests covering governance-managed register/deregister, DEFAULT_HOOK_TYPE dispatch, non-reverting HookFailed behavior, and independent coexistence of HOOK_TYPE_A and HOOK_TYPE_B.

test/EventCorrelator.ts passed 18 tests proving borrower+block correlation, closest-block matching, one-time notification pairing, and ms-resolution JSON formatting; the sample ts-node run emitted a structured log entry with correlatedAtMs/correlatedAtIso and matched liquidation/notifier tx hashes.

commands.command: cd /home/kpa/polkadot/dualvm && TMPDIR=/var/tmp npx hardhat test --no-compile test/XcmInbox.ts
commands.observation: 14 passing; output included ReceiptReceived emission, DuplicateCorrelationId rejection, and AccessManagedUnauthorized rejection coverage.

commands.command: cd /home/kpa/polkadot/dualvm && TMPDIR=/var/tmp npx hardhat test --no-compile test/LiquidationHookRegistry.ts
commands.observation: 27 passing; output included HookRegistered/HookDeregistered lifecycle, HookFailed non-reverting behavior, DEFAULT_HOOK_TYPE dispatch, and independent hook type coverage.

commands.command: cd /home/kpa/polkadot/dualvm && TMPDIR=/var/tmp npx hardhat test --no-compile test/EventCorrelator.ts
commands.observation: 18 passing; output included closest-block matching, tolerance handling, JSON-safe bigint serialisation, and ms-resolution timestamp formatting coverage.

commands.command: cd /home/kpa/polkadot/dualvm && TMPDIR=/var/tmp npx ts-node --transpile-only -e "import { correlateEvents, formatLogEntry } from './scripts/event-correlator'; ..."
